title: 10th anniversary
body: ![xarop logo](http://farm3.static.flickr.com/2310/1827477560_8de23ae2b6_m.jpg "xarop logo")This month marks 10 years since my friend [desfase](http://www.desfase.com) and I [registered the domain xarop.com](http://www.whois.net/whois_new.cgi?d=xarop&tld=com "view the WhoIs with registration details"), right after finishing a multimedia projects course back in 1998. At first we only signed up for email, but we soon built a website where we offered all kinds of services (hosting, design, etc.). We never made much money, and soon my partner turned his attention to his other "businesses," and I kept [xarop.com](http://www.xarop.com). For a while, I acted as an ISP (selling products like internet connections, domain registration, and hosting as an affiliate of [arsys](http://www.arsys.com) and other providers). Later, while waiting for a stroke of inspiration to create a “big hit” typical of that era, I converted the site into a portal in the style of [Terra](http://www.terra.com), where I posted all kinds of information and displayed ads that didn’t generate much revenue either. Finally, after trying out several [hosting providers](http://www.xarop.com/category/hosting/) and making several attempts at [dynamic portals](http://www.xarop.com/category/cms/ "CMS") (PHP-Nuke, Joomla, or Drupal), I converted the domain into this blog thanks to [WordPress](http://www.xarop.com/category/cms/wordpress/). You can see the evolution of this website thanks to services like the [Internet Archive Wayback Machine](http://web.archive.org/web/*/http://www.xarop.com "View the archive of xarop.com since 1998").
